# Linking Prior Experience to the Need for a Warm up Module


<!-- This is a comment. Below, you'll see code for inserting an image. To make this image appear, update <custom-path>. To add an image, save it inside the imgs folder of this repository. -->
<img src="<custom-path>/static/imgs/logo.png" alt="Image of Comp110 rainbow logo. "  width="500"/>

## Here are the graphs

My idea is that this course should have an optional beginner warm-up module before the first big programming assignment because it would help students with little or no prior CS experience to learn and practice before the course becomes more difficult, as well as reduce office hour visits for the beginner ideas.

<img src= "secondrepository/static/imgs/firstgraph.png"
alt= "Image of prior programming experience." width="500">
<img src= "secondrepository/static/imgs/secondgraph.png"
alt= "Image of prior programming experienc compared with course difficulty." width="500">
<img src= "secondrepository/static/imgs/thirdgraph.png"
alt= "Image of prior programming experienc compared with average understanding." width="500">
